race.comment: COURSE OF ACTION (1) missed the placings two runs back then didn't feature last start when eleventh over 1600m at Scone. Finds the right race this time and can turn things around. PERCOLATE (5) opened this prep with a win two runs ago. Less impressive last time out when sixth over 1600m at Hawkesbury after being in the firing line on the corner. Enjoys a drop in grade and is a leading contender. EN PRIMEUR (10) got well out of her ground and never a threat when eighth over 1400m at Inverell last start. Earlier runs had merit and look for a better showing. SEETHING CHUCK (7) found the line nicely first-up when second over 1305m at Tuncurry. Should be winding up late again and clearly come back well.
